---
title: "Figure 5 (distortion diagonals) — macro_IR diagonal of the Information / Sample / Correlation distortion matrices over (N_ch, interval, noise)"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
Same corner-of-paths view as figure_5_bias_path, but for the DIAGONAL of three per-parameter
distortion matrices of macro_IR, read from *_battery_sim.csv:
  - Likelihood_Information_Distortion
  - Likelihood_Sample_Distortion
  - Likelihood_Correlation_Distortion
Each is a p x p matrix; the diagonal is param_index == param_col. The entries are distortion
FACTORS around 1 (1 = no distortion), so the crosshair and the centred ticks sit at 1, not 0.

In every parameter pair each line joins the experiments that share N_ch (colour) and the point
size marks the interval Delta/tau. Three noise levels (0.1, 1, 10) are stacked, sharing scales so
they are comparable. ONE Rmd emits THREE PDFs, one per distortion matrix.
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r params}
DATA_DIR <- "../data/433ed13"
NSIM     <- 10000
NOISES   <- c("0.1", "1", "10")
ALGO     <- "macro_IR"
REF      <- 1                                     # distortion factor reference (no distortion)
ERR_MAX  <- 0.2                                   # drop points whose bootstrap CI half-width > this

# the four identified parameters, corner order, plotmath labels, and their model index
ORD       <- c("on", "off", "unitary_current", "Num_ch_mean")
PIDX      <- c(on = 0, off = 1, unitary_current = 2, Num_ch_mean = 5)
PARAM_LAB <- c(on = "log[10]~k[on]", off = "log[10]~k[off]",
               unitary_current = "log[10]~i", Num_ch_mean = "log[10]~N[ch]")

# the three matrices -> one PDF each
MATS <- list(
  list(comp = "Probit_statistics_Likelihood_Information_Distortion",
       title = "Information distortion (diagonal)", pdf = "Figure_5_info_distortion_diag.pdf"),
  list(comp = "Probit_statistics_Likelihood_Sample_Distortion",
       title = "Sample distortion (diagonal)",      pdf = "Figure_5_sample_distortion_diag.pdf"),
  list(comp = "Probit_statistics_Likelihood_Correlation_Distortion",
       title = "Correlation distortion (diagonal)", pdf = "Figure_5_corr_distortion_diag.pdf"))
```

```{r read}
read_tagged <- function(z) {
  files <- Sys.glob(file.path(DATA_DIR,
    sprintf("figure_3_nch_*_nsim_%d_%s_noise_%s_battery_sim.csv", NSIM, ALGO, z)))
  map_dfr(files, ~ read.csv(.x, skip = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>% mutate(noise = z))
}
bsim    <- map_dfr(NOISES, read_tagged)           # all N_ch (5, 10, ...) included
ALL_NCH <- sort(unique(bsim$Num_ch))              # shared colour mapping across corners
```

```{r extractors}
# GENERIC: pull the DIAGONAL of a per-parameter matrix component into a (Num_ch, interval,
# param, value, lo, hi) table. Diagonal = param_index == param_col; the param name is taken
# from the model index (PIDX). value = bootstrap mean; lo/hi = 95% percentile-bootstrap CI
# (probit quantiles 0.025 / 0.975).
per_param_diag <- function(df, comp) {
  df %>%
    filter(component_path == comp, statistic == "value",
           param_index == param_col, param_index %in% PIDX,
           probit == "mean" | (probit == "quantile" & quantile_level %in% c(0.025, 0.975))) %>%
    mutate(param_name = names(PIDX)[match(param_index, PIDX)],
           q = if_else(probit == "mean", "value",
                       if_else(quantile_level == 0.025, "lo", "hi"))) %>%
    group_by(Num_ch, interval_in_tau, param_name, q) %>%
    summarise(v = mean(value), .groups = "drop") %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = q, values_from = v) %>%
    filter(is.finite(lo), is.finite(hi), (hi - lo) / 2 <= ERR_MAX)   # drop large-uncertainty points
}

# turn a (Num_ch, interval, param, value/lo/hi) table into corner pair long-format (lower
# triangle), carrying the per-axis bootstrap CI (xlo/xhi, ylo/yhi) for the error crosses.
to_pairs <- function(long) {
  wide <- long %>% pivot_wider(names_from = param_name, values_from = c(value, lo, hi))
  prs  <- expand.grid(xp = ORD, yp = ORD, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
    filter(match(yp, ORD) > match(xp, ORD))
  map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(prs)), function(k) {
    xp <- prs$xp[k]; yp <- prs$yp[k]
    wide %>% transmute(Num_ch, interval_in_tau, xp = xp, yp = yp,
                       x  = .data[[paste0("value_", xp)]], xlo = .data[[paste0("lo_", xp)]], xhi = .data[[paste0("hi_", xp)]],
                       y  = .data[[paste0("value_", yp)]], ylo = .data[[paste0("lo_", yp)]], yhi = .data[[paste0("hi_", yp)]])
  }) %>% filter(is.finite(x), is.finite(y)) %>%
    mutate(xp = factor(xp, levels = ORD[1:3], labels = unname(PARAM_LAB[ORD[1:3]])),
           yp = factor(yp, levels = ORD[2:4], labels = unname(PARAM_LAB[ORD[2:4]])))
}
```

```{r corner-fn}
# round tick vector centred on `center` (~3 ticks so labels never collide in the narrow panels)
centered_break_vec <- function(center, half) {
  if (!is.finite(half) || half <= 0) return(center)
  raw  <- half * 0.6
  mag  <- 10^floor(log10(raw))
  step <- mag * c(1, 2, 5, 10)[findInterval(raw / mag, c(0, 1.5, 3.5, 7.5, Inf))]
  round(center + step * (-1:1), 6)
}
ref_breaks <- function(ref) function(lims) centered_break_vec(ref, max(abs(lims - ref)))

# corner of a per-parameter quantity: lines join equal-N_ch cells (colour), point size = interval,
# crosshair + centred ticks at `ref`.
corner_plot <- function(dd, ref = 0, lims = NULL, title = NULL,
                        nch_levels = sort(unique(dd$Num_ch)), show_legend = TRUE) {
  dd <- dd %>% arrange(Num_ch, interval_in_tau) %>%
    mutate(Nch = factor(Num_ch, levels = nch_levels))
  g <- ggplot(dd, aes(x, y))
  if (!is.null(lims)) g <- g + geom_blank(data = lims, aes(x, y))   # shared scales across corners
  p <- g +
    geom_hline(yintercept = ref, colour = "grey80", linewidth = .3) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = ref, colour = "grey80", linewidth = .3) +
    # 95% percentile-bootstrap CI as a faint grey error cross per point (x and y)
    geom_segment(aes(x = xlo, xend = xhi, y = y, yend = y), colour = "grey55", linewidth = .2, alpha = .4) +
    geom_segment(aes(x = x, xend = x, y = ylo, yend = yhi), colour = "grey55", linewidth = .2, alpha = .4) +
    geom_path(aes(colour = Nch, group = Num_ch), linewidth = .4, alpha = .9, show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_point(aes(colour = Nch, size = interval_in_tau), alpha = .9) +
    facet_grid(yp ~ xp, scales = "free", drop = FALSE, labeller = label_parsed) +
    scale_x_log10(breaks = ref_breaks(ref)) + scale_y_log10(breaks = ref_breaks(ref)) +
    scale_colour_viridis_d(name = expression(N[ch]), end = .9, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_size(name = expression(Delta/tau[min]), trans = "log10",
               range = c(.5, 2.7), breaks = c(.01, .1, 1)) +
    # one guide each (stop the colour aesthetic from splitting into two N_ch legends)
    guides(colour = guide_legend(order = 1, override.aes = list(size = 2.2)),
           size   = guide_legend(order = 2, override.aes = list(colour = "grey30"))) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = title) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 9) +
    theme(legend.position = "right", panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          strip.text = element_text(size = 8),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"))
  if (!show_legend) p <- p + guides(colour = "none", size = "none")   # legend only on the top corner
  p
}

# one PDF: the diagonal of `comp`, three stacked noise corners with shared (ref-centred) scales
build_one <- function(comp, title, pdf) {
  pbn <- lapply(NOISES, function(z)
    to_pairs(per_param_diag(filter(bsim, noise == z), comp)) %>% mutate(noise = z))
  # log-symmetric limits around REF (multiplicative factors -> symmetric in log), CI included
  lims  <- bind_rows(pbn) %>% group_by(xp, yp) %>%
    summarise(Lx = max(abs(log10(c(x, xlo, xhi) / REF))),
              Ly = max(abs(log10(c(y, ylo, yhi) / REF))), .groups = "drop")
  blank <- bind_rows(transmute(lims, xp, yp, x = REF * 10^Lx,    y = REF * 10^Ly),
                     transmute(lims, xp, yp, x = REF * 10^(-Lx), y = REF * 10^(-Ly)))
  corners <- lapply(seq_along(NOISES), function(i)
    corner_plot(pbn[[i]], ref = REF, lims = blank, nch_levels = ALL_NCH,
                title = paste("noise =", NOISES[i]), show_legend = (i == 1)))
  g <- wrap_plots(corners, ncol = 1, guides = "collect") +
    plot_annotation(
      title    = paste0("macro_IR  ", title),
      subtitle = "diagonal distortion factor (1 = no distortion); colour = N_ch, point size = interval")
  ggsave(pdf, g, width = 7.0, height = 16)
  g
}
```

```{r plot, fig.width = 7.0, fig.height = 16, results = "asis"}
for (M in MATS) print(build_one(M$comp, M$title, M$pdf))
```
